zh.lifeSummary: 當Ealdred of Bamburgh於大約0997年出生在英國諾圖波藍德班包時，他的父親Uchtred of Bamburgh27歲，母親Ecgfryth of Durham25歲。他和Unknown至少有5個女兒。他去世於1038年在英國諾圖恩布利亞享年42歲，埋葬在英國諾圖波藍德班布盧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ealdred of Bamburgh于大约0997年出生在英国諾圖波藍德班包时，他的父亲Uchtred of Bamburgh27岁，母亲Ecgfryth of Durham25岁。他和Unknown至少有5个女儿。他去世于1038年在英国諾圖恩布利亞享年42岁，埋葬在英国諾圖波藍德班布盧。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Bamburgh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bamberg
meanings: German and Jewish (western Ashkenazic): habitational name from the city of Bamberg in Bavaria (formerly in Upper Franconia).
History: Between 1007 and 1702 the city of Bamberg was the capital of a powerful ecclesiastical state, and in the 15th century the bishops of Bamberg were raised to princely rank.

historicEvents.title: St. Brice's Day Massacre
historicEvents.description: King Aethelred ordered all Danish men in England to be killed. It is unknown how many Danes were killed due to this order.

historicEvents.title: Sweyn Forkbeard
historicEvents.description: The Danes raided and captured England. Sweyn, King of Danes, was declared King of England on Christmas Day.

historicEvents.title: Canut the Great
historicEvents.description: As Aethelred, King of England died, his son, Edmund Ironside devised a truce with Danish King Canute. The truce divided the kingdom between the two but Edmund died shortly after and became King of England. Several years later, he also became king of Denmark.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

en.lifeSummary: When Ealdred of Bamburgh was born about 0997, in Bamburgh, Northumberland, England, his father, Uchtred of Bamburgh, was 27 and his mother, Ecgfryth of Durham, was 25. He had at least 5 daughters with Unknown. He died in 1038, in Northumbria, England, at the age of 42, and was buried in Bambrough, Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ealdred of Bamburgh est né environ 0997, à Bamburgh, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Uchtred of Bamburgh, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Ecgfryth of Durham, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 filles avec Unknown. Il est décédé en 1038, à Northumbria, Angleterre, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Bambrough, Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ealdred of Bamburgh um 0997 in Bamburgh, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Uchtred of Bamburgh 27 und seine Mutter Ecgfryth of Durham 25. Er hatte mit Unknown mindestens 5 Töchter. Er starb 1038 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Northumbria, England und wurde in Bambrough, Northumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ealdred of Bamburgh è nato il circa 0997 nel Bamburgh, Northumberland, England, il suo padre, Uchtred of Bamburgh, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Ecgfryth of Durham, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figlie con Unknown. Morì nel 1038, nel Northumbria, England, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolto a Bambrough, Northumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ealdred of Bamburghが約0997年にイギリスノースウンバーランドバンブルグで生まれた時，父Uchtred of Bamburghは27歳，母Ecgfryth of Durhamは25歳であった。彼はUnknownとの間に少なくとも5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1038年にイギリスノースウンブリアで42歳で死去し，イギリスノースウンバーランドバンブロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ealdred of Bamburgh(이)가 대략 0997년 영국 노르스벌랜드 바버그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Uchtred of Bamburgh(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Ecgfryth of Durham(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Unknown(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1038년 영국 노르스브리아에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르스벌랜드 바브루그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ealdred of Bamburgh nasceu aproximadamente 0997, em Bamburgh, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Uchtred of Bamburgh, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Ecgfryth of Durham, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhas com Unknown. Ele faleceu em 1038, em Northumbria, Inglaterra, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em Bambrough, Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ealdred of Bamburgh родился около 0997 г. в местности бамбург, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Uchtred of Bamburgh было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Ecgfryth of Durham, 25. У него было по крайней мере 5 дочерей от Unknown. Он умер в 1038 г. в местности нортумбря, Англия в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности бамброую, нортумбирланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ealdred of Bamburgh nació aproximadamente 0997, en Bamburgh, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Uchtred of Bamburgh, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Ecgfryth of Durham, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijas con Unknown. Murió en 1038, en Northumbria, Inglaterra, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultado en Bambrough, Northumberland, Inglaterra.
